name: oh-my-claudeagent
description: Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. Specialist agents handle planning, execution, code review, debugging, and research with evidence-based verification.

enableKeywordTriggers.title: Enable keyword triggers
enableKeywordTriggers.description: Optional compatibility setting for legacy keyword-trigger workflows (default: false).

statuslineMode.title: Statusline mode
statuslineMode.description: Preferred OMCA statusline mode: off, direct, or daemon (default: direct).

disableForceOrchestrationStyle.title: Disable forced orchestration output style
disableForceOrchestrationStyle.description: When true, removes the force-for-plugin: true line from the installed output-styles/omca-default.md cache copy so your own outputStyle setting takes precedence instead of the plugin's orchestration style. The strip is applied at /oh-my-claudeagent:omca-setup time; you must re-run omca-setup after every plugin update (or /plugin marketplace update omca) because the cache copy may be overwritten and the strip will need re-application.
